questions.scenario: The production group has `orders-web-01` and `orders-web-02`. You want the first run to touch only `orders-web-01` while still using the production inventory. Which target choice is safest?

options.text: `--limit orders-web-01` with the normal production inventory.
`--limit all` because the playbook has only one role.
Remove `orders-web-02` from inventory and put it back after the run.
Run against `localhost` first because that proves the remote hosts will work.

questions.explanation: `--limit orders-web-01` keeps the inventory honest and narrows only this run. Editing production inventory to create a canary hides the real fleet shape.
